description.value: All creatures in 10-foot radius sphere at medium range make Will saves. Compare your Targeting successes to each target's save successes. Those you beat are confused. At the start of each confused creature's turn, roll 1d8: 1-2 = do nothing, 3-4 = no action and move random direction, 5-6 = attack nearest creature, 7-8 = act normally. Can repeat save at end of each turn (1 success ends effect). Creatures immune to charm are immune to this weave.

system.weavingRoll: Negative Potential + Negative Mastery / Space Potential + Space Mastery
